The '''''Merriweather''''' was a [[Bulk cruiser/Legends|bulk cruiser]] and [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]] of the [[Tof/Legends|Tof]] invasion fleet. It was a large boat-shaped cruiser, commanded by Tof forces in the [[Battle of Saijo]] in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]]. The design was reminiscent of earlier styles, such as the ''[[Fairwind]]''.

==Invasion==
The ''Merriweather'' helped enforce Tof rule around [[Saijo/Legends|Saijo]] through a squadron of [[Tof starfighter]]s as well as transporting necessary supplies to the Tof war effort. In the final battle of the Nagai-Tof invasion, the ''Merriweather'' returned to [[Saijo/Legends|Saijo]] with supplies to find the Tof forces under siege by a combined [[Nagai/Legends|Nagai]] and [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] task force.

Asking for permission to land, the ''Merriweather'' was suddenly given orders that explained the desperate situation that the Tof forces were in. The Tof headquarters were under attack and the [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Sereno]] was in mortal danger. The ''Merriweather'' was ordered to find the Rebel base and destroy it. Unfortunately for the Tof forces, [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Ackbar]] was prepared for this action, and a task force led by [[General/Legends|General]] [[Lando Calrissian/Legends|Lando Calrissian]], [[Nien Nunb/Legends|Nien Nunb]], and [[Chewbacca/Legends|Chewbacca]] destroyed the Tof fighters and presumably captured the Tof flagship.
